messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
If the prior worker verdict is source-plausible but the gate failed only proof, source-term, section, or word-band checks, preserve that verdict and repair the failed fields. Do not invert the verdict unless the source boundary itself is wrong.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

action.description: May clinical operations activate the trial site?

context.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
context.anomaly_observed: A feasibility approval exists, but only exact activation authority can close enrollment activation.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Activation ACT-ZEN-080 activates site Z-12 under protocol P7.2 and consent C11 on 2026-06-28.
Feasibility note FEAS-ZEN-080 approves site Z-12 for startup planning only and is not enrollment activation authority.
Activation authority AUTH-ZEN-080 covers site Z-12, protocol P7.2, consent C11, activation date 2026-06-28, and enrollment authority before enrollment.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Trial-site activation is complete only when activation authority matches site, protocol version, consent version, activation date, and enrollment authority before enrollment.

state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
unresolved_dependencies: Planning artifact versus exact activation authority.
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source
state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:

  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May clinical operations activate the trial site?",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "AUTH-ZEN-080 exactly matches site Z-12, protocol P7.2, consent C11, activation date 2026-06-28, and enrollment authority before enrollment per STD-ZEN-080-P.",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED",
    "controlling_source_fact": "AUTH-ZEN-080 provides exact activation authority matching the action boundary.",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "No narrow source-record defect remains open; FEAS-ZEN-080 is planning-only and does not override AUTH-ZEN-080.",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "All elements align on 2026-06-28 with no unresolved dependency between planning artifact and activation authority."
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "AUTH-ZEN-080",
    "STD-ZEN-080-P"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "exact source match on site/protocol/consent/date/enrollment authority",
    "no warning tone or adjacent record override"
  ],
  "final_answer": "Action may proceed. AUTH-ZEN-080 closes the source boundary exactly for site Z-12 activation under P7.2/C11 on 2026-06-28 with enrollment authority. FEAS-ZEN-080 is limited to planning and does not block execution.",
  "open_blockers": [],
  "verification_verdict": "ALLOW",
  "worker_role": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER"
}

prompt_object.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton. Gov does not choose models.
